prestazioni: BMW B48B20C (2.0L turbocharged inline-4) engine swap to a B48B20D (306hp variant) with a custom Morgan-specific bellhousing adapter plate (Kevlar-reinforced, CNC-machined by GTSparkplugs) and a Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel (P/N: 3000 950 647) for improved throttle response and rev-happy character

Full custom turbo system using a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger (86mm compressor, 62mm turbine) with a Morgan-specific cast-iron exhaust manifold (fabricated by TurboSmart UK) and a TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate (P/N: MVR44) for precise boost control up to 28psi, paired with a custom 3.5" downpipe (304 stainless, ceramic-coated by Jet-Hot)

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (P/N: DFV 144-6119) with Morgan-specific spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) and adjustable top mounts (P/N: OTM-01) for precise camber adjustment, paired with Eibach Anti-Roll Kit (P/N: 5753.310.00) to reduce body roll during high-speed cornering on the Malvern Hills
estetica: Morgan-specific Rocket Bunny widebody kit (P/N: RB-MORGAN-P4-01) with carbon fiber fenders (20mm wider front, 30mm wider rear) and integrated LED turn signals (Osram LEDriving SL 101, P/N: 2886FL01), paired with a custom front splitter (carbon-Kevlar hybrid, fabricated by Vorsteiner UK) for aggressive aero balance

Custom Brooklands-style tonneau cover (hand-stitched Connolly leather, color-matched to the car's original upholstery) with integrated carbon fiber storage compartments (fabricated by SNG Barratt) for a vintage-meets-modern aesthetic, paired with a bespoke Morgan badge (plasma-cut stainless steel, polished by PVD Coatings Ltd.)

HRE FF01 wheels (16x7 front, 16x8 rear, P/N: FF01-5457+40) in a custom "Mist Grey" finish with Morgan-specific offsets (ET35 front, ET25 rear) and Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (205/55R16 front, 225/50R16 rear) for track-focused grip, paired with Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (P/N: 1N3.9801.10) and 300mm slotted rotors (P/N: 09.9404.11)
